The GOAT Difference

Why homeowners choose us over the rest

Northern Beaches is full of carpenters. Here's what clients tell us they actually notice.

01

You deal with Tom, not a call centre

The person who quotes your job is the person who builds it. Direct communication from first message to final sweep-up.

02

Built to last, not just to look good

Every deck, gate and wall is built for the coastal Northern Beaches climate — proper fixings, proper timber, proper falls.

03

Design help, not just labour

Can't picture it? We sketch it, suggest better layouts, and help you avoid the mistakes that show up years later.

04

We leave your site cleaner than we found it

Cleaned up at the end of every single day. It's the small thing every review mentions first.

What We Build

Carpentry that changes how a home feels

From a single feature wall to a full outdoor rebuild — one crew, start to finish.

Media Walls

Feature TV walls with built-in shelving, fireplaces and concealed cabling.

Decks & Balustrades

Composite and hardwood decking, stairs, balustrades and pergolas.

Doors & Entries

Custom entry doors, security gates and smart lock installation.

Gates & Fencing

Merbau, slat and picket gates built to handle daily use for years.

Outdoor Kitchens

Built-in BBQ surrounds with timber slat cladding and stone tops.

All Carpentry

Custom joinery, storage benches, boardwalks — if it's timber, we build it.

Built across the Northern Beaches
